title: solanum aethiopicum subsp. anguivi
intro: Solanum aethiopicum subsp. anguivi, also known as the edible nightshade or African eggplant, is a subspecies of the Solanum aethiopicum plant, which is a member of the nightshade family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, providing health benefits such as reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Solanum aethiopicum subsp. anguivi is often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
